ee:transform.doc:name: Request Payload of first composite call

logger.doc:name: First Request Composite payload Log Message

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json var opportunity = (vars.getCompositeResponse.compositeResponse filter ($.referenceId == "GetOpportunityByTransactionId"))[0].body.records default []
--- if(!isEmpty(opportunity)) opportunity[0].Name else null

set-variable.doc:name: Updated giftJson Variable

logger.doc:name: Log End
logger.message: #['[FLOW_END] get-salesforce-data-sub, Gift Json Data published successfully to queue']

ee:transform.doc:name: Request Payload of second Composite call

logger.doc:name: Second Request Composite payload Log Message

sub-flow.name: insert-salesforce-orderItem-sub
sub-flow.doc:name: SF Donation Order Item Upsert Sub

logger.doc:name: Request Payload of OrderItem sObject Call
